title: A Rooftop Clash Against Kaido and Big Mom
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Kaido, Nami, Unknown person #7, Luffy as The Worst Generation confronts Kaido and Big Mom on Onigashima.
scene: On the rooftop of Onigashima, the Worst Generation challenges Kaido and Big Mom directly, turning the raid into a clash against emperors.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey Killer!! Don't Let up now! We're gonna finish Kaido off!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This really is like facing a natural disaster!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! What do you think you're doing to my captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way I'm gonna let you eat him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So the sword is the source of that strange. Haki...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes... that stinging sensation. I get it now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To think you'd try and counter my twister with your own!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Battle on the Roof must be insane!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Our supplier went and got himself killed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And the feast they invited us to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: is devolving into a full-blown battlefield.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Rooftop Battle storyline through 37 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
